originalTitle: The DJI Osmo Pocket 3 lookalike is down to $329
summary: Initially, I was going to tell you about a good deal happening on the DJI Osmo Pocket 3, which is down from the $500 it’s sold at most of the year to $378 at multiple retailers. But there’s a better deal happening on a nearly identical portable camera, the Xtra Muse, which is $329 (roughly […]
content: Initially, I was going to tell you about a good deal happening on the DJI Osmo Pocket 3, which is down from the $500 it’s sold at most of the year to $378 at multiple retailers. But there’s a better deal happening on a nearly identical portable camera, the Xtra Muse, which is $329 (roughly $100 off what it sold for three months ago). It’s not just some copycat; my colleague Sean Hollister’s report on the company is linked below, wherein he said the Muse “appears to be the same product in almost every palpable way,” though DJI won’t comment on its involvement with Xtra. Regardless, you can save a good bit of change on the Muse right now at Amazon. It seems great for vlogging (Sean uses the DJI Osmo Pocket 3 for recording Today I’m Toying with videos), or for any scenario where you want better footage than your smartphone can likely capture. [Product: Xtra Muse vlogging camera | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FL9DN3GY?tag=theverge02-20] At launch, the Muse couldn’t connect to Bluetooth mics, which meant that DJI’s own wireless mics were off the table. But as of a February firmware update, it can wirelessly connect to various mics, including DJI’s Mic 2, Mini Mini and the Mic 3, among others. Other great Verge-approved deals * You can jump into Resident Evil Requiem on Steam at the lowest price we’ve seen so far. The title is selling for $55.99 at Steam during its summer sale, though Newegg has it for $10 less. You can checkout for $44.99 with the code 5DSUMMER, which is a savings of over 30 percent off the original cost. Requiem proves that the decades-old franchise is heading in a good direction, with a fun mix of first-person horror and callbacks to Resident Evil 4’s over-the-shoulder camera and action-filled gameplay. Read our review as well as our thoughts on the slightly pared down Switch 2 version. * Best Buy still has the lowest prices on Apple’s last-gen (but still great) iPad Air with the M3 processor. While retailers like Amazon and Walmart are either out of stock or selling refurbished tablets around $450 and up, Best Buy has the 128GB version with Wi-Fi and 5G support for $499. Sure, you could opt just for the version that offers just Wi-Fi connectivity at the same price, but it’s a better value to get the cellular option. As I mentioned last week when this deal surfaced, it’s a good and significantly cheaper alternative to the newer M4 Air that starts at $749 following Apple’s recent price hikes. The M3 processor is only slightly slower, it has 8GB of memory instead of 12GB, and its wireless radio is older, but it’s otherwise nearly identical. * Still on Apple, its wireless Magic Mouse is regularly available at Amazon for $69 (sometimes less, selling as low as $60 during Prime Day). That’s for the white version, though. The sleek black mouse typically has a higher price, but it’s also seeing a discount. You can get it at Amazon for $79.99, which is the lowest price on record. The last time this product dipped down in price was last September when it sold for $85. Since then, it has sold for $95 or higher. The latest Magic Mouse supports USB-C charging and includes a woven cable, but yes, you still need to flip it over to access its charging port.
chineseTitle: 相似的 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 低至 329 美元
chineseSummary: 最初，我想告诉大家 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 发生了一笔划算的交易，它在多家零售商处的售价从一年中大部分时间的 500 美元降至 378 美元。但是，几乎相同的便携式相机 Xtra Muse 有更好的优惠，售价 329 美元（大约 [...]
chineseContent: 最初，我想告诉大家 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 发生了一笔划算的交易，它在多家零售商处的售价从一年中大部分时间的 500 美元降至 378 美元。但一款几乎相同的便携式相机 Xtra Muse 则有更好的优惠，售价 329 美元（比三个月前的售价大约便宜 100 美元）。这不仅仅是一些模仿者；我的同事肖恩·霍利斯特（Sean Hollister）对该公司的报告如下，他说 Muse“几乎在所有明显的方面都是同一个产品”，尽管大疆不会就其与 Xtra 的合作发表评论。不管怎样，你现在可以在亚马逊的 Muse 上省下一大笔零钱。它似乎非常适合视频博客（Sean 使用 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 来录制“今天我正在玩弄”视频），或者适合任何您想要比智能手机可能捕捉到的更好的镜头的场景。 [产品：Xtra Muse 视频博客相机 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FL9DN3GY?tag=theverge02-20] 发布时，Muse 无法连接蓝牙麦克风，这意味着 DJI 自己的无线麦克风无法使用。但从 2 月份的固件更新开始，它可以无线连接到各种麦克风，包括 DJI 的 Mic 2、Mini Mini 和 Mic 3 等。其他经 Verge 批准的超值优惠 * 您可以以迄今为止最低的价格购买 Steam 上的《生化危机安魂曲》。该游戏在 Steam 夏季促销期间的售价为 55.99 美元，而 Newegg 的售价则低 10 美元。您可以使用代码 5DSUMMER 以 44.99 美元的价格结帐，这比原始成本节省了 30% 以上。 《安魂曲》证明了这个拥有数十年历史的系列正在朝着好的方向发展，它有趣地融合了第一人称恐怖、回想起《生化危机 4》的肩扛镜头和充满动作的游戏玩法。阅读我们的评论以及我们对这一点的看法
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
